narration: Every year, you hand over $270 just to file your taxes. But here's what nobody tells you — you never had to pay a single dollar.
visual: Large red '$270' springs up center; person silhouette on left, suited tax preparer on right, dashed arrow with dollar signs crossing between them

narration: Sixty million Americans paid for tax prep last year. That's a sixteen-billion-dollar industry built on one thing — you not knowing your options.
visual: Grid of 60 small person icons filling screen one by one; animated counter counting up to 60,000,000; '$16 BILLION DOLLAR INDUSTRY' badge fades in

narration: The IRS has offered completely free filing for over twenty years. It's called Free File — and the industry spent $6.6 million lobbying to make sure you never heard of it.
visual: Laptop SVG with glowing green 'IRS FREE FILE' on screen; money bag labeled '$6.6M' slides toward Capitol building silhouette; 'FREE FOR 20+ YEARS' text fades in

narration: If you earned under seventy-nine thousand dollars last year, you qualify. That covers seventy percent of all American taxpayers leaving free money on the table.
visual: Income progress bar; '$79K' threshold marker; green checkmark springs in; '70% OF ALL TAXPAYERS QUALIFY' badge bounces in

narration: Here's the real kicker — that $270 invested every year for thirty years at seven percent? That's over twenty-one thousand dollars your tax preparer quietly stole from your future.
visual: Two bars: small red '$270/yr wasted' bar vs tall growing green '$21,600 invested' bar; '$21,600' number springs in at top of green bar

narration: Right now, search IRS Free File on your phone. Save your $270 this year and start investing it instead. Your future self will seriously thank you.
visual: Phone SVG showing search bar with 'IRS Free File'; piggy bank springs in; '$270 SAVED' green badge bounces in; CTA text fades up
